recommendations.title: April Fool's Day
recommendations.overview: As soon as Muffy St. John and her college friends arrive on her parents' secluded island, someone starts trimming the guest list... one murder at a time.

recommendations.title: Lost & Found
recommendations.overview: Mario, a worker in "lost and found" department, finds a suitcase with a dead baby inside.

recommendations.title: The Boys in the Band
recommendations.overview: At a birthday party in 1968 New York, a surprise guest and a drunken game leave seven gay friends reckoning with unspoken feelings and buried truths.

recommendations.title: The First Temptation of Christ
recommendations.overview: Jesus, who's hitting the big 3-0, brings a surprise guest to meet the family. A Christmas special so wrong it must be from comedians Porta dos Fundos.

recommendations.title: Zoey 102
recommendations.overview: Pacific Coast Academy alumni return to Malibu for an over-the-top wedding that turns into a high school reunion for the books.

recommendations.title: The Headless Woman
recommendations.overview: After running into something with her car, Vero experiences a particular psychological state. She realizes she might have killed someone.

recommendations.title: Dinner for One
recommendations.overview: A very old woman wants to have dinner with her friends. As they are all dead, the butler has to play the role of every guest.

recommendations.title: They/Them
recommendations.overview: Campers at an LGBTQ+ conversion camp endure unsettling psychological techniques while the campsite is stalked by a mysterious killer.

recommendations.title: Ash
recommendations.overview: On the mysterious planet of Ash, Riya awakens to find her crew slaughtered. When a man named Brion arrives to rescue her, an ordeal of psychological and physical terror ensues while Riya and Brion must decide if they can trust one another to survive.

recommendations.title: The Rutles: All You Need Is Cash
recommendations.overview: The story of the rise and fall of the Pre-Fab Four.
